untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification ('confirmation price' level) cannot be translated to quantitative indicators without explicit price levels or pattern recognition logic not available in allowed indicators. Stop loss placement marked as 'AUTHOR_SILENT' in source material. Confirmation price threshold is not numerically defined in the provided text.
translation_notes: Signal describes a top/reversal pattern with downside breakout and ~1-day target reach at 30.10. Entry condition requires price confirmation below a pattern-dependent 'confirmation price' which is not translatable to standard technical indicators. The rule cautions against early entry (65% failure rate if entering without confirmation). Hold period set to 1 day based on 'approximately a day after breakout' statement. Success rate documented as 72-79%. Absence of stop loss guidance requires manual specification.
